utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each item includes the necessary details: type of coverage and cost information (monthly and annual), and for additional_services, the services and costs are specified. The total_budget includes both monthly and annual cost breakdowns. Therefore, all items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan shows three main insurance components all provided by 'LifeFirst': (1) health_coverage combining physical and mental health, (2) property_coverage for home contents and electronics, and (3) travel_coverage for global adventure travel. In the ground-truth data, these correspond respectively to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (under both physical and mental health), 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (under property_protection), and 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance). The plan also lists additional services—wellness programs, gym reimbursement, and telemedicine support—which correspond to 'Wellness Programs', 'Gym Membership Reimbursement', and 'Telemedicine Services' under health_enhancement_services. Therefore, we map each selected item to its ground-truth rating.
